zh.Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Cornu於大約1370年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Sir Robert Cornu of Thornbury32歲，母親Mrs Robert Cornu27歲。她於大約1385年與Robert Cruwys在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1413年6月30日之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Cornu于大约1370年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Sir Robert Cornu of Thornbury32岁，母亲Mrs Robert Cornu27岁。她于大约1385年与Robert Cruwys在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1413年6月30日之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Cornu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Lancashire): variant of Cornish or Corn , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Cornish
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from the county of Cornwall, from Middle English Cornish, Cornysh formed on the analogy of English, which was usually Normanized as Corneys. Not surprisingly, the surname is common in adjacent Devon, but it is also established as far afield as Suffolk and London.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Cornu was born about 1370, in Devon, England, her father, Sir Robert Cornu of Thornbury, was 32 and her mother, Mrs Robert Cornu, was 27. She married Robert Cruwys about 1385, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 30 June 1413, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Cornu est née environ 1370, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Cornu of Thornbury, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs Robert Cornu, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Cruwys environ 1385, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 30 juin 1413, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Cornu um 1370 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Cornu of Thornbury 32 und ihre Mutter Mrs Robert Cornu 27. Sie hat um 1385 in Devon, England Robert Cruwys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 30. Juni 1413 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Cornu è nata il circa 1370 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Cornu of Thornbury, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mrs Robert Cornu, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Robert Cruwys circa 1385, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 30 giugno 1413, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Cornuが約1370年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Cornu of Thornburyは32歳，母Mrs Robert Cornuは27歳であった。約1385年にイギリスデボンでRobert Cruwysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1413年6月30日以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Cornu(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Cornu of Thornbury(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Robert Cornu(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1385년 영국 데폰에서 Robert Cruwys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1413년 6월 30일 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Cornu nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Cornu of Thornbury, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Robert Cornu, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Cruwys aproximadamente 1385, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 30 de junho de 1413, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Cornu родилась около 1370 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Cornu of Thornbury было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Robert Cornu, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Cruwys около 1385 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 30 июнь 1413 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Cornu nació aproximadamente 1370, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Cornu of Thornbury, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs Robert Cornu, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Robert Cruwys aproximadamente 1385, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 30 de junio de 1413, en su pueblo.
